positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting serenely among glowing autumn leaves and hanging paper lanterns. The fox has flowing, ethereal tails and striking amber eyes. The composition is highly symmetrical, centered around the fox and the focal point of warm light. Style is Neo-Japanese Ukiyo-e meets modern vector illustration, featuring strong black outlines, high contrast, and limited, complementary colors (deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, gold, and ivory). Ensure the subject is isolated against a slightly textured, muted background to maximize print visibility. Flat graphic style with deep dimensional shadows for pop.
